patternName: React White Screen Import Cascade Failure
triggerCondition: Complex import chains with missing ErrorBoundary components

cascadingFailures: App.tsx line 220: GlobalErrorBoundary undefined -> App crashes
App.tsx lines 234-335: RouteErrorBoundary undefined -> All routes crash
App.tsx lines 243-292: AsyncErrorBoundary undefined -> Async components crash
ErrorBoundary.jsx exists but newer ErrorBoundary.tsx components missing

buildVsRuntime.buildSuccess: Vite builds without TypeScript strict checking on missing components
buildVsRuntime.runtimeFailure: React fails to mount due to undefined component references
buildVsRuntime.detectionGap: Build tools don't validate component existence at compile time

importChainAnalysis.importPattern: Complex @/ path resolution with TypeScript interfaces
importChainAnalysis.cascadeEffect: One missing component breaks entire application mount

errorBoundaryIssues.expectedBehavior: Should gracefully handle component failures with fallback UI
errorBoundaryIssues.actualBehavior: Silent crash with white screen - no error visibility

detectionChallenges.buildToolLimitations: Vite doesn't validate component references at build time
detectionChallenges.silentFailure: No console errors or visible indication of failure

userImpact.userExperience: White screen with no indication of problem
userImpact.detectionTime: Requires manual browser testing - no automated alerts

previousPatterns.recurrencePattern: Complex component additions trigger cascade failures

tddFactors.preventionCapability: High - TDD would catch import failures

immediateActions: Implement component existence validation in build pipeline
Add import integrity testing to CI/CD
longTermStrategy: Progressive complexity addition with validation gates

keyIndicators: Vite build success with React mount failure
Multiple missing component references in App.tsx

recoveryData.fallbackPattern: Reduce complexity to essential components only
recoveryData.emergencyProtocol: Maintain simple fallback version for critical failures
